study: Journal Square (Jersey City, NJ) Class A multifamily market monitor

units_latest.desc: Every available unit at each building's latest pull.

survey_latest.desc: By-type market survey across in-market Class A units.

timeseries.desc: One row per snapshot date for trend-over-time.

units_12mo.desc: One row per unique unit observed in the trailing 12 months (latest values, first/last seen, active flag).

unit_mix.desc: Per-building bedroom census (Studio/1BR/2BR/3BR counts, shares, sourcing basis).
